description_long: This is a wooden bench with a simple, utilitarian design, featuring three horizontal slats forming the backrest and four slats making up the seat. The bench is supported by two robust, A-frame style legs on each side, which provide stability and a rustic appearance. The wood has a weathered, matte finish, suggesting it is intended for outdoor use and can withstand exposure to the elements. There are no armrests, giving the bench an open and accessible feel. The seat is wide and flat, suitable for multiple people, while the backrest is slightly angled for comfort. The overall construction appears sturdy, with all visible components made from the same type of wood.
description: A sturdy, weathered wooden bench with a slatted seat and backrest, supported by A-frame legs and no armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled backrest and the A-frame leg structure.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the three horizontal backrest slats and the symmetrical leg supports.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slatted seat and backrest with the A-frame support.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide, flat seat and the open, armless design.
